chapter_title.en: Chapter 82 – The one performing Itikaaf sleeps with his wife

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/437)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/437)
text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنْ مُعْتَكِفٍ وَاقَعَ أَهْلَهُ قَالَ هُوَ بِمَنْزِلَةِ مَنْ أَفْطَرَ يَوْماً مِنْ شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Abdul Rahman Bin Abu Najran, from Abdullah Bin Mugheira, from Sama’at Bin Mihran who said,
‘I asked Abu Abdullahasws about the one performing Itikaaf falling upon his wife. Heasws said: ‘He is as the status of the one who breaks a Fast of a day from the Month of Ramazan’.
en.sarwar: 2. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ‘Abd al-Rahman ibn abu Najran from ‘Abd Allah ibn al- Mughirah from Sanaa ‘ah ibn Mehran who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about a man who in ‘Itikaf engages in sexual relation with his wife. He (the Imam) said, ‘He is like one who destroys one day of fast in the month of Ramadan.’”
